title: Low-Carbon Liquid Fuels of the Future Made In Australia
content: The Albanese Government is delivering $250 million to accelerate the pace of Australiaâ€™s growing domestic Low Carbon Liquid Fuels (LCLF) industry. This funding is part of the $1.7 billion Future Made in Australia Innovation Fund and will be provided as grants to support pre-commercial innovation, demonstration and deployment.
author: Analysts Account
